name: Old Lightbulb (Tier 1)
description: An old lightbulb that only occasionally lights up. Hopefully it won't leak electricity!

name: Old Fashioned Stage Lights (Tier 1)
description: A classic style. Back in the day, it was the best lighting around.

name: Windmill Stage Lights (Tier 1)
description: The fake flowers on the wire are very realistic.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Big Candy Light (Tier 1)
description: Emits a warm light. Everyone looks sweet under this lighting.

name: Fairy Tale Hat Light (Tier 1)
description: Pull on the switch ever so gently.

name: Full Energy (Tier 1)
description: Let's have an energetic day!

name: Skeleton Lamp (Tier 1)
description: Just relax—the lamp is mounted tightly, so it won't fall.

name: Winter's Symphonic Movement (Tier 1)
description: This lamp has a warming effect, so performances in the snow won't be too cold.

name: Candle Lantern (Tier 1)
description: Everyone's passion keeps the candle burning!

name: Rose Starry Light (Tier 1)
description: Stars can always illuminate you, regardless of how weakly they twinkle.

name: Cute Disco (Tier 1)
description: Let's dance together!

name: Classical Carnival (Tier 1)
description: Make vintage art popular again!

name: Berry Chandelier (Tier 1)
description: It sometimes emits static noises due to the cold.

name: Midnight Moonlight (Tier 1)
description: The gentle moonlight spills down upon every corner of the world.

name: Twisted Stage (Tier 1)
description: Let's start grooving to the beat!

name: Midnight Echoes (Tier 1)
description: A sudden rhythmic knocking of glass disrupts the silence of the night.

name: Snowy Night's Plum Streetlamp (Tier 1)
description: Turning back suddenly, I realise that my old friend is still standing underneath the streetlamp.

name: Blossoming Vitality (Tier 1)
description: Children, come and display the most energetic side of you!

name: Underwater Beacon (Tier 1)
description: Emits a gentle but penetrating light.

name: Orangey Fragrance (Tier 1)
description: I'm so tempted to eat the bright orange.

name: Party White Noise (Tier 1)
description: Party till the sun rises! You only live once!

name: Soft Lighting (Tier 1)
description: The soft lighting can add a hazy aesthetic to one silhouette.

name: Veiled Dreamscape (Tier 1)
description: Weave a gorgeous dream on the stage.

name: Bright Opus (Tier 1)
description: The lantern's color temperature is just right. The flowers surrounding it are also very tasteful.

name: Candy Cane Hat (Tier 1)
description: The stand of the lamp looks so similar to a Candy cane that even the light it emits seems to be sweet.

name: Fluffy Lantern (Tier 1)
description: The red apple lantern glows with a warm light.

name: Imperial Lantern (Tier 1)
description: Its flickering light twinkles like stars across the night sky.

name: Blissful Cake Light (Tier 1)
description: Practical and stylish.

name: Gravity Spotlight (Tier 1)
description: How amazing! It Can even glow when it's not plugged in!

name: Log Plank
description: Made from the tree in the backyard.

name: Secret of the Vines
description: The gnomes like hiding little things in the grass on top.

name: Windmill Memories
description: When the windmill turns, it brings in the scent of the sea.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Sweet Impression
description: Cookies that look to be chocolate-flavored.

name: Wonderful Dream
description: Everything you think of will come true in your dreams.

name: Galactic News
description: Breaking news! Something big happend!

name: Moment of Silence
description: Things got eerily quiet all of a sudden...

name: Cozy Christmas Night
description: Warms up your winter nights.

name: A Night to Remember
description: With this bustling atmosphere, tonight sure is unforgettable.

name: Summer Dream
description: Summer dreams smell of roses.

name: Golden Age
description: The golden years filled with memories.

name: Tranquil Field
description: Makes one feel like lying down and sunbathing.

name: Marvelous Roast
description: Freshly released details on performances!

name: Devout Winged Crown
description: Whenever you've lost yourself, make your way here. The wings will guide you to the right path.

name: Hazy Vow
description: Do you still remember the promise from the past?

name: Warm Jingle-jangle
description: Good fortune is sure to follow anyone who hears the bells ringing!

name: Noticeboard of Wonders
description: All of the wonderful things that can be found throughout the world will be displayed here.

name: Floral Noticeboard
description: All sorts of information can be found here.

name: Fruitful Achievements
description: A truly fruit-full party!

name: Colorful Symphony
description: 3, 2, 1! It's the rhythm of the rainbow! Join in and put your hands up in the air!

name: Puppy News
description: Woof woof, have a look at today's headlines!

name: Seashell Tales
description: I wonder what interesting performances there are to view today.

name: Lace Epilogue
description: The gemstone dazzles beneath the sun's reflection.

name: Golden Promise
description: Oh my, I almost missed the announcementfor that grand and majestic performance!

name: Orange Mist Signboard
description: After you pass through the misty forest, a gigantic circus sign welcomes you!

name: Starry Snow Dream
description: If a star is planted in the snow, will a Star Tree sprout?

name: Morning Anecdotes
description: Find out about all that's new and interesting!

name: Geometric Planet
description: Beep! Check out today's planeary news.

name: Simple Ticket Booth
description: A temporary ticket booth made from wood.

name: Pine Ticket Booth
description: Be good and line up. Tickets will be checked in order!

name: Classy Ticket Booth
description: This blue table helps calm your nerves.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Cute Ticket Booth
description: The candy-scented tickets sold are sweet and

name: Mystery Ticket Booth
description: Who will be the mystery guest performing tonight?

name: Manual Ticket Booth
description: It looks automatic, but it's actually manual.

name: Guarded Ticket Booth
description: The Hat Monster who guards the ticket booth allows no mistakes.

name: Snowball Ticket Booth
description: The meticulous Snowball will be sure to calculate each and every bill.

name: Calligraphy Ticket Booth
description: Records the people's love with wonderful penmanship.

name: Magic Ticket Booth
description: A magician pulling an all-nighter left behind this messy workbench.

name: Hand-Drawn Ticket Booth
description: Every ticket is a unique piece of artwork.

name: Needlework Ticket Booth
description: You can make merchandise on the spot with this!

name: Icy Ticket Booth
description: Everyone's enthusiasm will dispel the cold.

name: Cheesy Ticket Booth
description: There's surely a performance that you'll enjoy.

name: Phantom Ticket Booth
description: Is the ticketer invisible, or do they move too fast> Either way, nobody has seen them before.

name: Dreary Fragrance
description: Beware of the inexplicable fragrance that wafts over at midnight...

name: Never-ending Ticket Booth
description: Passengers come and go in a never-ending stream.

name: Sweet Surprise
description: An unexpected assault of sweetness has arrived!

name: Fruity Ticket Booth
description: Why are you secretly snacking on oranges while working?!

name: Hazy Beam
description: Hey, hey, hey! Don't throw voided ticket stubs into this box!

name: Late Summer Ticket Booth
description: After finishing your desserts, remember to wash your hands before picking up the ticket stub.

name: Octopus Ticket Booth
description: Naturally, the currency used to purchase tickets is the octopus seller's favorite thing.

name: Birdsong Ticket Booth
description: Please hand you ticket over to the birdie for inspection!

name: Distinguished Table
description: Dear quest, here's a special handwritten letter than is just for you.

name: Revolving Magic Table
description: Ghosts are usually discouraged from performing magic tricks unless they persist in doing so.

name: Snowcapped Bell Tower
description: Please queue up for your tickets to be checked.

name: Springtime Desk
description: Which mischievous little guy left these footprints?

name: Little Dino Ticket Booth
description: Just leave the ticket checking to Little Dino!

name: Simple Water Fountain
description: Very simple, but practical.

name: Barrel Water Fountain
description: Can store lots of water.

name: Island Water Fountain
description: Nobody knows what island it was brought from.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Sweet Paper Cups
description: The sweet water inside is delicious!

name: Bottomless Teacup
description: It never empties no matter how much you drink.

name: Wind-up Drinking Fountain
description: Wind it up more to get water.

name: Pumpkin Water Fountain
description: Huh? How come the fountain water is green?

name: Lucky Water Fountain
description: They say Santa blessed this water fountain, so if you drink from it, you'll have good luck!

name: Porcelain Water Fountain
description: Seems perfect for pet fishes.

name: Elegant Water Fountain
description: The water surface glistens with the starry night's reflection.

name: Purifying Fountain
description: Contains the power to heal.

name: Iced Summer Beverage
description: Nothing feels better than a big gulp of iced water!

name: Starry Water Fountain
description: The water comes from snowy mountain peaks.

name: Hot Cheesy Canele
description: Can anyone resist taking a bite out of this?

name: Scented Water Fountain
description: Everyone who passes by walks away with a floral scent.

name: Forbidden Romance
description: The vines climb upward eagerly, craving the water.

name: Seamless Horizon
description: Watching the rippling sky blue water makes for a peaceful moment.

name: Fantastical Honey
description: I hope that you'll dream an endless stream of sweet fantasies.

name: Glass Strawberry Fountain
description: Why does the water taste like strawberries?

name: Disco Component
description: This sound of water flowing is just as rhythmic!

name: Mint Chocolate Herbel Tea
description: Hm? Why does the water taste a little minty?

name: Ocean Spring
description: Contains an endless supply of oceanic magic.

name: Glass Stationery
description: I can tell what the hydrangea is thinking about through the stained glass.

name: Swan Fountain
description: The flowing waters tell stories that no one else knows about.

name: Floating Hot Air Balloon
description: How can I drink it when it keeps bobbing up and down?

name: Christmas Spring
description: Clean water from melted snow, perfectly safe to drink.

name: Springlit Pond
description: The frost melts, revealing the crytal clear water in the well.

name: Egg Shell Fountain
description: What a tough eggshell! I wonder which planet it came from.

name: Performance Collage
description: There seems to be a mystery guest?

name: Event Collage
description: There are so many events. Let's have some fun!

name: Rainbow Wind Chimes
description: Ring, ring goes the song of colors in the wind.

name: Brass Hanging Clock
description: Unfriendly toward those with neck problems.

name: Ladybug Lamp
description: It looks more like a firefly at night.

name: Swinging Candy Cane
description: Snowball comes here to swing when nobody notices.

name: Frost Mirror
description: Even the snow cannot hide your beauty.

name: Elf Work Attire
description: Clothes that a Christmas elf wears when delivering presents.

name: Graffiti Painting
description: A self-portrait of Snowball.

name: Stocking Banner
description: Lalala! Fill the stockings to the brim with presents!

name: Pine Cone Candlestick
description: It burns even longer than regular candlesticks.

name: Crunchy Apple Clock
description: It's so crunchy that you have to be careful when you handle it.

name: Portable Fridge
description: Have a refreshing can of iced cola!

name: Music Banner
description: The music notes are dancing!

name: Flower Tent
description: A simple tent with a faint floral scent inside.

name: Swaying Swing
description: Swing and enjoy a leisurely afternoon.

name: Hot Air Balloon
description: I want to go back up into the sky!

name: Berry Pot - Red
description: Don't steal the berries!

name: Berry Pot - Green
description: Don't steal the berries!

name: Bear Sign
description: Today's Special: Christmas Exclusive - Smoked Ham

name: Rotating Signpost
description: Don't keep staring at it. You'll get dizzy.

name: Storage Boots
description: A ton of things can be stuffed inside these boots!

name: Winter Beach Umbrella
description: Protection from the sun is still paramount during winter!

name: Resting Teddy Bear
description: This teddy bear is so cute, it's fine if it takes a short break, right?

name: Cozy Wintry Round Rug
description: Brings a little warmth into your life.

name: Journey of Freedom
description: Embark on a journey that truly belongs to you!

name: Curtain of Endings and Beginnings
description: We're always in an endless cycle of the opening and closing acts!

name: Guidance Snowman
description: Esteemed guest, please proceed this way.

name: Stationary Clock
description: Standing right here quietly, it has witnessed many stories.

name: Snowing Gift Box
description: It's snowing inside the gift box!

name: Apple Birdie
description: It sips tea and watches the snow fall.

name: Glass Scroll Jar
description: Makes you want to write a poem!
